seo.title: Contact & Hours — Grand Pavilion 大观楼
seo.description: Visit us at 133-24 Roosevelt Ave, Flushing NY. Open daily. Call (718) 555-0188 or reserve online.

info.addressZh: 纽约州法拉盛罗斯福大道133-24号，11354
info.parking: Street parking available on Roosevelt Ave. Validated parking at adjacent garage on weekends.
info.parkingZh: 罗斯福大道有路边停车。周末在相邻车库可验证停车。

hours.heading: Hours · 营业时间
hours.dimSumNote: Dim sum served daily 10am – 3pm (weekend brunch from 9:30am)
hours.dimSumNoteZh: 每日点心供应上午10时至下午3时（周末早午餐从早9时30分开始）
